calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys' Fees Pursuant To Ccp 1717, Ccp 1032, Ccp 1033.5 & Ccp 685.040
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas B. Provencher, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary E. Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Laura Ann Schoolcraft, a/k/a Laura A. Sommers, individually, dba Patrick Davids Cafe or Patrick David Schoolcraft, a/k/a Patrick D. Schoolcraft, indidually dba Patrick Davids Cafe.
Defaults were entered against the defendants on June 9, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against the Defaulted Defendants Laura Ann Schoolcraft, a/k/a Laura A. Sommers, individually dba Patrick Davids Cafe, and Patrick David Schoolcraft, a/k/a Patrick D. Schoolcraft, individually dba Patrick Davids Cafe, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $55,012.22.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,278.92.
Attorney Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $560.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $57,851.14.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Continued To Oct-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Continued To Sep-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'S Ex Parte Application For Right To Attach Order And For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Dave Marcollini, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade association, Inc.

No other appearance, after hearing:
(1) Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Laura Ann Schoolcraft is Granted.
(2) Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Patrick David Schoolcraft is Granted.
Orders signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
